auth.heading: Reach a Pro OTC Experience in 3 Steps

activate.title: Activate Your Account
activate.description: Log in with the temporary password sent to your email.

application.title: Complete Your Application
application.description: Securely upload required information and documents for corporate activation.

password.title: Set Your Password
password.description: Create a strong password for your account.

start.title: Start Trading
start.description: Once approved, execute OTC trades instantly with tailored rates.

verification.title: Enter Verification Code
verification.description: Enter the 4-digit verification code sent to {{phone}}
verification.smsInitFailed: SMS initialization failed. Please try again.
verification.missingParamsDesc: Information required for activation was not found. Redirecting to login page.
verification.verifyFailed: Verification failed. Please check your code.
verification.linkExpiredDesc: This verification link has expired. You can send a new verification email to activate your account.

password.title: Set a New Password
password.description: For account security, create a strong password with letters, numbers, and special characters.
password.descriptionWithEmail: for account security, create a strong password with letters, numbers, and special characters.
password.helper: Choose a strong password with at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.
password.mismatchError: The passwords you entered do not match.

success.title: Password Created
success.description: You can now sign in securely and start OTC trading.

loginPage.title: Sign In to Your Account
loginPage.description: Enter your email address and password to access your account.
loginPage.errorDescription: Email and password fields are required.

registerPage.title: Submit Your Application
registerPage.description: Fill out the short form to create your corporate account.

returnUser.title: The Most Secure Address for High-Volume Trades
returnUser.subtitle: Manage your OTC trades professionally with deep liquidity, competitive pricing, and fast settlement.

securityRequired.title: Security Verification Required
securityRequired.description: To continue, please complete all of the verifications below.

securityEmail.title: Verify Your Email
securityEmail.description: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to {{email}}.
securityEmail.label: Verification Code

securityPhone.title: Verify Your Phone Number
securityPhone.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent via SMS to {{phone}}.
securityPhone.label: Verification Code

security2fa.title: 2FA Verification
security2fa.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app to sign in.
security2fa.label: Verification Code

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email address to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDesc: Password reset link has been sent to your email address.
